The '''Y-TIE''' was an [[Ugly/Legends|Ugly]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] built by replacing the standard engine package of a [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighter]] with the radiator wings and ion engines of a standard [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]]. The [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] from the TIE replaced the [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]] in the Y-wing's turret, and the TIE's [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] package replaced the Y-wing's missing sensor array.

This ship was one of the more common "Ugly" designs, thanks to the fact that Y-wings and TIE Fighters were two of the most common ship designs in use. It was neither fast nor maneuverable, but was comparatively durable and packed a punch. In a way, it combined the strengths of both fighters, having better shields and weaponry than a [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] and better engines and firepower than a [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing]], whereas the opposite can be said for the [[TYE-wing]].
